# Market Pulse — U.S. Equities Dashboard
> A real-time dashboard analyzing U.S. Equities, Market Breadth, and S&P 500 / Nasdaq performance.

## Main sections
- `Market Pulse -> /`: Real-time U.S. Equities Dashboard
- `Market Breadth -> /#/breadth`: Market breadth indicators and analysis
- `Macro Analysis -> /#/macro`: Macroeconomic drivers and stock market outlook

## Key facts
- Analyzes major drivers of the stock market including geopolitical events (e.g., Iran war, oil prices).
- Tracks Federal Reserve policies, leadership changes (e.g., Jerome Powell, Kevin Warsh), and interest rate paths.
- Evaluates corporate earnings, specifically S&P 500 companies and AI capital expenditures.
- Provides quantitative scores for indices and sectors.
